div.p: BW_per_node = k × msg_size × (1 / interval) With k=3, msg=500B, interval=200ms: BW = 3 × 500 × 5 = 7,500 B/s (gossip only) Including anti-entropy (every 10s):

g.text: Scaling factor < 1.0 indicates efficient delta-based sending
Per-node BW decreases as 1/N; Total BW remains constant
Per-node BW grows with N; Indicates broadcast bug

div.p: • Node not excluding self from peer selection • Full-state sync instead of delta • Missing seen-message cache • Fanout = N-1 (broadcast mode)

g.text: Baseline is push gossip; Spikes are anti-entropy syncs
